mapper.select: SELECT id AS entry_id, 'USER' AS entry_type, user_id AS owner_user_id, 'PRIVATE' AS visibility, wordbook_id, word, phonetic, meaning_cn, example_sentence, category, NULL AS bnc_rank, NULL AS frq_rank, NULL AS wordfreq_zipf, NULL AS exchange_info, NULL AS data_quality, import_source FROM user_vocabulary_entries WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND wordbook_id = #{wordbookId}
SELECT id FROM public_vocabulary_entries WHERE LOWER(word) = LOWER(#{word}) ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO public_vocabulary_entries( word, phonetic, meaning_cn, example_sentence, bnc_rank, frq_rank, wordfreq_zipf, exchange_info, data_quality, audio_url, import_source, created_at ) VALUES ( #{word}, #{phonetic}, #{meaningCn}, #{exampleSentence}, #{bncRank}, #{frqRank}, #{wordfreqZipf}, #{exchangeInfo}, #{dataQuality}, #{audioUrl}, #{importSource}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE public_vocabulary_entries SET word = #{word}, phonetic = #{phonetic}, meaning_cn = #{meaningCn}, example_sentence = #{exampleSentence}, bnc_rank = #{bncRank}, frq_rank = #{frqRank}, wordfreq_zipf = #{wordfreqZipf}, exchange_info = #{exchangeInfo}, data_quality = #{dataQuality}, audio_url = #{audioUrl}, import_source = #{importSource} WHERE id = #{entryId}
mapper.select: SELECT id AS entry_id, 'PUBLIC' AS entry_type, NULL AS owner_user_id, 'PUBLIC' AS visibility, NULL AS wordbook_id, word, phonetic, meaning_cn, example_sentence, NULL AS category, bnc_rank, frq_rank, wordfreq_zipf, exchange_info, data_quality, import_source FROM public_vocabulary_entries WHERE id = #{entryId}

SELECT id AS entry_id, 'USER' AS entry_type, user_id AS owner_user_id, 'PRIVATE' AS visibility, wordbook_id, word, phonetic, meaning_cn, example_sentence, category, NULL AS bnc_rank, NULL AS frq_rank, NULL AS wordfreq_zipf, NULL AS exchange_info, NULL AS data_quality, import_source FROM user_vocabulary_entries WHERE id = #{entryId}
SELECT id FROM public_vocabulary_entries WHERE LOWER(word) = LOWER(#{word}) ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT v.id AS entry_id, 'PUBLIC' AS entry_type, NULL AS owner_user_id, NULL AS wordbook_id, 'English Nova Public Catalog' AS wordbook_name, v.word, v.phonetic, v.meaning_cn, v.example_sentence, NULL AS category, v.bnc_rank, v.frq_rank, v.wordfreq_zipf, v.exchange_info, v.data_quality, NULL AS difficulty, 'PUBLIC' AS visibility, v.audio_url, v.import_source, 'ECDICT + dictionaryapi.dev' AS source_name FROM public_vocabulary_entries v WHERE v.id = #{entryId} LIMIT 1

SELECT v.id AS entry_id, 'USER' AS entry_type, v.user_id AS owner_user_id, v.wordbook_id, w.name AS wordbook_name, v.word, v.phonetic, v.meaning_cn, v.example_sentence, v.category, NULL AS bnc_rank, NULL AS frq_rank, NULL AS wordfreq_zipf, NULL AS exchange_info, NULL AS data_quality, v.difficulty, 'PRIVATE' AS visibility, v.audio_url, v.import_source, w.source_name FROM user_vocabulary_entries v JOIN wordbooks w ON w.id = v.wordbook_id WHERE v.id = #{entryId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id AS entry_id, 'PUBLIC' AS entry_type, NULL AS owner_user_id, 'PUBLIC' AS visibility, NULL AS wordbook_id, word, phonetic, meaning_cn, example_sentence, NULL AS category, bnc_rank, frq_rank, wordfreq_zipf, exchange_info, data_quality, import_source FROM public_vocabulary_entries

SELECT id AS entry_id, 'USER' AS entry_type, user_id AS owner_user_id, 'PRIVATE' AS visibility, wordbook_id, word, phonetic, meaning_cn, example_sentence, category, NULL AS bnc_rank, NULL AS frq_rank, NULL AS wordfreq_zipf, NULL AS exchange_info, NULL AS data_quality, import_source FROM user_vocabulary_entries
SELECT id, word, import_source, phonetic, meaning_cn, example_sentence, '' AS category FROM public_vocabulary_entries
SELECT id, word, import_source, phonetic, meaning_cn, example_sentence, category FROM user_vocabulary_entries
